generation_notes.seamless: All layers horizontal seamless. Verify 2x width preview.
generation_notes.alpha: Far/Mid/Near need transparency for layer stacking.
generation_notes.mirage_animation: Far layer mirage is 4-frame loop — generate as sprite sheet or separate frames.
generation_notes.crystal_glow_shift: Day: crystals dim. Dusk: begin glow. Night: full gold→orange pulse.
generation_notes.heat_haze: Day/Dusk only. Applied as post-process shader or baked into near layer.
